# File Operations Test - Verify File Manipulation During Tests
# Demonstrates: file creation, reading, copying, directory management

# Create test directory structure
exec mkdir -p /tmp/mcptest
cd /tmp/mcptest

# Test file creation and reading
exec sh -c 'echo "test content" > test.txt'
exec cat test.txt
stdout "test content"

# Test file copying
exec cp test.txt test_copy.txt
exec cat test_copy.txt
stdout "test content"

# Test multiple files
exec sh -c 'echo "file1" > file1.txt; echo "file2" > file2.txt'
exec ls -1
stdout "file1.txt"
stdout "file2.txt"

# Test file modification
exec sh -c 'echo "appended" >> test.txt'
exec cat test.txt
stdout "test content"
stdout "appended"

# Test file removal
exec rm test_copy.txt
exec ls -1
! stdout "test_copy.txt"

# Verify only expected files remain
exec ls -1
stdout "test.txt"
stdout "file1.txt"
